title: Agent SDK vs raw Messages API for building agents

dimensions.name: Tool execution
dimensions.a: Built-in: Read, Edit, Bash, etc. are provided and executed for you
dimensions.b: DIY: you define tool schemas, receive tool_use blocks, execute them yourself, and send results back

dimensions.name: Agent loop
dimensions.a: Managed: the SDK runs the think → act → observe loop automatically until the task is done
dimensions.b: Manual: you write the while-loop, handle stop reasons, and decide when to keep going

dimensions.name: Context management
dimensions.a: Handled: the SDK manages conversation history, token budgets, and context window internally
dimensions.b: Your responsibility: you track messages, count tokens, and truncate or summarize as needed

dimensions.name: When to choose
dimensions.a: You want a capable autonomous agent fast, and Claude Code's tool set fits your use case
dimensions.b: You need full control over tools, loop logic, or want to use non-Claude-Code tools
